label: CIS Safeguard 14.8
title: Train Workforce on the Dangers of Connecting to and Transmitting Enterprise Data Over Insecure Networks

prose.en: Train workforce members on the dangers of connecting to, and transmitting data over, insecure networks for enterprise activities. If the enterprise has remote workers, training must include guidance to ensure that all users securely configure their home network infrastructure.
Workforce members are trained on the dangers of connecting to and transmitting data over insecure networks for enterprise activities.
For enterprises with remote workers, training includes guidance to ensure that all users securely configure their home network infrastructure.
